articles.title: Iran-backed hackers breach FBI director Kash Patel's personal emails
articles.summary: A hacker group shares Patel's purported resume and photos - information, the FBI says, is "historical in nature".

articles.title: Tiger Woods charged with driving under influence after crash
articles.summary: Tiger Woods is charged with driving under the influence after rolling his car in a crash in Florida, police confirm.
